comment.text: This key displays the minimum required currency amount for a payment, used in error messages within form fields. It appears in the Storage Plan Upgrade and Top-up Balance sections of the Portal Settings, indicating the lowest acceptable value for a currency input. The value is dynamically inserted with the currency type (e.g., "min $10").

usage.context:
</Text>
 <FieldContainer
 isVertical
 errorMessage={
 hasMinError
 ? t("MinCurrency", {
 currency: `${MIN_VALUE} ${t("Common:Gigabyte")}`,
 })
 : ""
 }
 hasError={hasMinError}

</Text>
 <FieldContainer
 isVertical
 errorMessage={
 hasMinError
 ? t("MinCurrency", {
 currency: formatWalletCurrency!(+minValue!, 0),
 })
 : ""
 }
 hasError={hasError}
